resources.string:
Having stock Shizuku installed alongside Shizuku+ can cause permission conflicts and app crashes. To ensure Shizuku+ functions correctly, please uninstall or disable the stock Shizuku app.

You can do this via:
1. Settings -> Apps -> Shizuku -> Disable/Uninstall
2. Below buttons (if Shizuku+ service is running)
3. ADB: adb shell pm disable-user --user 0 moe.shizuku.privileged.api
Stock Shizuku has been disabled successfully.
Failed to disable Stock Shizuku. Ensure Shizuku+ is running or use ADB manually.
Third-party apps (like SwiftBackup) will now seamlessly detect Shizuku+.
Third-party apps that explicitly check for stock Shizuku will not detect Shizuku+. Install the lightweight Compat Hub to allow apps to detect Shizuku+.
Failed to install. Ensure Shizuku+ or Root is active.
